title: Unverifiable remote endpoint is UNKNOWN, never SAFE

origin.description: Contract seed: a server defined only by a remote URL on an unrecognized host. Replace with a redacted real-world snapshot before R2 final acceptance.

humanExpectation.rationale: A remote endpoint on an unrecognized host cannot be inspected offline, so its risk surface is genuinely unproven; the honest verdict is UNKNOWN, which must never silently become SAFE.
knownLimitations: Offline by design, CallLint does not fetch the endpoint. With --online a future round could attempt verification, but the default offline verdict stays UNKNOWN.
